title: melasma indicum
intro: Melasma indicum, also known as Plectranthus indicus, is a plant species in the family Lamiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic and Unani medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is known for its potential health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Melasma indicum is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
